text: Action: During a conflict at this province, choose an attacking character. Your opponent selects one - either bow that character or they give you 1 honor.
name: The Eternal Watch

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – your opponent loses X fate, where X is the number of attacking characters.
flavorText: "The path to enlightenment is one that must be walked alone." - Togashi Hassuno
name: Seeking Enlightenment

text: During conflicts at this province, each character in play is considered to have no fate on it, and fate tokens cannot be moved or removed from those characters.
flavorText: A single night can change the course of history
name: By Onnotangu's Light

text: Dire - This character gets +3[conflict-military]. (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)
flavorText: "While my honor cannot be redeemed, my service can still be fulfilled"
name: Damned Hida

text: Dire - This character gets +2[conflict-military] and +2[conflict-political]. (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)
flavorText: With the capital in chaos, any hope that the violence throughout Rokugan could be brought to an end faded into memory.
name: Desperate Negotiator

text: Each character you control gains: "Dire - You may trigger each of this character's triggered abilities an additional time each round (or specified period)."
flavorText: The Empire is fast approaching a time where both madness and enlightenment will be needed.
name: Togashi Kazue

text: Dire - This character does not bow as the result of conflict resolution. (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)
flavorText: "I shall not stop fighting until the honor of the Lion has been avenged."
name: Lion's Pride Paragon

text: While there is a Battlefield in play, fate cannot be removed from characters you control by opponents' card or ring effects.
name: Forward Garrison

text: Dire - This character gets +3 glory. Reaction: After 1 or more fate is removed from this character outside the fate phase, choose another character - remove 1 fate from that character.
flavorText: "I cannot abandon even a kansen to endless suffering."
name: Kaito Mai

text: Dire - This character gains: "Action: Bow this character. Choose another character - dishonor that character." (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)
name: Yogo Paramour

text: Reaction: After 1 or more fate is removed from a character you control outside the fate phase - draw 1 card (draw 2 cards instead if that character is dishonored).
name: Shadowed Village

text: While you are the first player, this character gains covert. Reaction: After you play a Meishōdō or Mahō card, lose 1 honor - place 1 fate on this character.
flavorText: "I can help you, my prince, if you will allow me."
name: Iuchi Shahai

text: No attachments except Shadowlands or Spell. While this character is dishonored, reduce the cost to play each Mahō card you play by 1 (to a minimum of 0).
name: Resourceful Mahō-Tsukai

text:
This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control.
Limited. Restricted.
Attached character cannot be honored.
name: Tetsubō of Blood

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel against a character your opponent controls in their home area - resolve the duel. Move the duel's loser to the conflict, if able. Otherwise, move it home.
name: Disparaging Challenge

text: Reaction: After you declare a Monk character as an attacker or defender - search the top 8 cards of your conflict deck for up to 2 Kihō cards with different names, reveal them, and add them to your hand. Shuffle.
name: Ki Alignment

text: Air Role only. Reaction: After the conflict phase begins, break a faceup (friendly) province - place 1 fate on each character you control with printed cost 3 or lower.
name: Feeding An Army

text:
Play only if you have at least 1 ring in your claimed ring pool.
Ancestral.
Fate on attached character cannot be removed by card or ring effects.
name: In Harmony

text: Fire role only. This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control. Action: Dishonor a (friendly) character. Choose up to X attachments, where X is the dishonored character's glory - discard each of those attachments.
name: Sanguine Mastery

text: This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control. Action: During a conflict, choose a non-unique character - take control of that character until the end of the conflict. You lose honor equal to the amount of fate on that character.
name: Seize the Mind

text: Attached character gains "Action: Choose another character - move 1 fate from this character to the chosen character."
flavorText: "Should you invoke the spirit's Name, you shall divert the path of its destiny." Iuchi Daiyu
name: Command the Tributary

text: This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on characters you control. Action: During a conflict dishonor a (friendly) participating character. Choose a character - move both the dishonored character and the chosen character home.
name: Bonds of Blood
